zh.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham是Richard Echingham和Katherine的兒子，於大約1272年出生在英國素可。他和Joan Dakeney至少有4個兒子。他去世於1350年8月22日在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham是Richard Echingham和Katherine的儿子，于大约1272年出生在英国素可。他和Joan Dakeney至少有4个儿子。他去世于1350年8月22日在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham was born about 1272, in Sussex, England as the son of Richard Echingham and Katherine. He had at least 4 sons with Joan Dakeney. He died on 22 August 1350, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham est né environ 1272, à Sussex, Angleterre, fils de Richard Echingham et Katherine. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Joan Dakeney. Il est décédé le 22 août 1350, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham wurde um 1272 in Sussex, England, als Sohn von Richard Echingham und Katherine geboren. Er hatte mit Joan Dakeney mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 22. August 1350 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham è nato il circa 1272 nel Sussex, England come figlio di Richard Echingham e Katherine. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Joan Dakeney. Morì il 22 agosto 1350, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.Echingham, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Echynghamは約1272年にイギリススセックスでRichard EchinghamとKatherineの息子として生まれた。彼はJoan Dakeneyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1350年8月22日に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham(은)는 대략 1272년 영국 수세스에서 Richard Echingham(와)과 Katherine의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Joan Dakeney(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1350년 8월 22일 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Sussex, Inglaterra filho de Richard Echingham e Katherine. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Joan Dakeney. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1350, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham родился около 1272 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. Его родителей звали Richard Echingham и Katherine. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Joan Dakeney. Он умер 22 августа 1350 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir James Echyngham nació aproximadamente 1272, en Sussex, Inglaterra como hijo de Richard Echingham y Katherine. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Joan Dakeney. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1350, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
